name: City Runners
background: The Gangs of New Eden are various factions of violent and deranged outlaws that wage eternal gang wars on the streets of New Eden. These gangs are joined by mercenaries which are not bound to any particular gang, and which fight for anyone that can provide riches or a worthy cause.

spells.name: Cyber-City Connection
spells.effect: Pick one friendly unit within 12", which gets Runner Boost once (next time the effect would apply).

spells.name: Energy Storm
spells.effect: Pick one enemy unit within 12", which takes 2 hits with AP(1) and Crack. Roll as many dice as hits to see if "on rolls of 6" effects trigger.

specialRules.name: Melee Shrouding Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get Melee Shrouding. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule. This effect lasts until the first wave of reinforcements is deployed.

specialRules.name: Piercing Tag
specialRules.description: Only one use per game. Once per game, during this model's activation, pick one enemy unit within 36" and in line of sight of it, and place X markers on it. When attacking, friendly units may remove markers from their target before rolling to block to get +AP(Y), where Y is the number of removed markers.

specialRules.name: Repel Ambushers
specialRules.description: Enemy units using Ambush must be set up over 12" away from this model's unit.

specialRules.name: Thrust Mark
specialRules.description: Only one use per game. Once per activation, before attacking, pick up to 4 enemy units within 18", which friendly units gets Thrust in melee against once (next time the effect would apply).

specialRules.name: Runner
specialRules.description: Moves +2" when using Advance, and +2” when using Rush/Charge.

specialRules.name: Ambush Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get Ambush. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule. This effect lasts until the first wave of reinforcements is deployed.

specialRules.name: Runner Boost Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get Runner Boost. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule. This effect lasts until the first wave of reinforcements is deployed.

specialRules.name: Quick Shot Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get Quick Shot. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule. This effect lasts until the first wave of reinforcements is deployed.

specialRules.name: Hit & Run Fighter Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get Hit & Run Fighter. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule. This effect lasts until the first wave of reinforcements is deployed.

specialRules.name: Surge
specialRules.description: On unmodified results of 6 to hit, this weapon deals 1 extra hits (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).

specialRules.name: Crack
specialRules.description: On unmodified results of 6 to hit, those hits get AP(+2).

specialRules.name: Melee Shrouding
specialRules.description: Enemies get -3" movement when trying to charge units where all models have this rule.

specialRules.name: AP
specialRules.description: Targets get -X to Defense rolls when blocking hits.

specialRules.name: Ambush
specialRules.description: May be set aside before deployment. At the start of any round after the first, may be placed anywhere over 9” away from enemy units.

specialRules.name: Thrust
specialRules.description: When charging, gets +1 to hit rolls and AP(+1) in melee.

specialRules.name: Runner Boost
specialRules.description: Models with Runner in this unit move +4" on Advance and +4" on Rush/Charge from Runner (instead of only +2" and +2").

specialRules.name: Quick
specialRules.description: Moves +2" when using Advance, and +2” when using Rush/Charge.

specialRules.name: Quick Shot
specialRules.description: This model may shoot after using Rush actions.

specialRules.name: Hit & Run
specialRules.description: Units where all models have this rule may move by up to 3" after shooting or being in melee.

specialRules.name: Hit & Run Fighter
specialRules.description: Units where all models have this rule may move by up to 3" after being in melee.

specialRules.name: Blast
specialRules.description: Ignores cover, and after resolving other special rules, each hit is multiplied by X, where X is up to as many hits as enemy models in the target unit and within 3” of it. Hits must be split evenly between all enemy units within 3” of any model from the target (players pick how).

specialRules.name: Regeneration
specialRules.description: When a unit where all models have this rule takes wounds, roll one die for each. On a 5+ it is ignored.

specialRules.name: Deadly
specialRules.description: Assign each wound to one model, and multiply it by X. Hits from Deadly must be resolved first, and these wounds don’t carry over to other models if the original target is killed.
